test.name: facet filter mode optimizer review coverage

queries.sphinxql: create table facet_opt_review ( title text, brand_id integer, color_id integer, size_id integer )
insert into facet_opt_review ( id, title, brand_id, color_id, size_id ) values (1,'p1',7,1,10), (2,'p2',7,1,20), (3,'p3',7,2,10), (4,'p4',8,1,10), (5,'p5',8,3,20)
